title: Understanding the Problem
text: To find the final position of the particle, you need to add the initial position vector to the displacement vector.

title: Initial Position Vector
text: The initial position of the particle is given as $$1.5j+4k$$ meters.

title: Displacement Vector
text: The displacement of the particle is given as $$2.5i+3.2j-1.2k$$ meters.

title: Calculate the Final Position
text: Add the initial position vector and the displacement vector: $$1.5j+4k+2.5i+3.2j-1.2k$$.

title: Final Position Vector
text: The final position vector is the sum of the initial position vector and the displacement vector.
